title: The Ember Restaurant
testimonial: We had a very specific vision — warm, intimate, theatrical. Groove Infra brought it to life exactly. The restaurant has been fully booked every weekend since opening.
description: An 80-cover fine dining restaurant with a dramatic open kitchen concept. The brief called for warm textures — exposed brick, aged brass, smoked oak — contrasted with statement lighting installations. Features include a wine display wall, private dining room, chef's table, and outdoor terrace seating.
